RSVP.title: RSVP
RSVP.description: Guest RSVP attendance response for the wedding ceremonies.

fullName.description: The full name of the guest.

attendingEvents.description: List of wedding ceremonies the guest is attending (Haldi, Wedding, Vidai).

guestsCount.description: Number of guests attending with this RSVP.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp of when the RSVP was submitted.

Blessing.title: Blessing Message
Blessing.description: Blessing or congratulatory message from a guest on the digital guestbook.

relation.description: Relationship with the groom or bride (e.g., Groom's Family, Bride's Family, Well Wisher).

message.description: The blessing or warm message text.

cardStyle.description: The style preset ID chosen for rendering the blessing card.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp of when the blessing was posted.

/blessings/{blessingId}.description: Collection of public blessings in the guestbook.
